text: I feel a sense of intellectual stimulation and curiosity here. The setting is clean and modern, with glass walls and design elements that evoke innovation and research. The words on the wall—‘R+D’, ‘Responsive and rapidly evolving Development space’—echo themes of progress and inquiry. Surrounded by exhibits and digital displays, I am both an observer and a participant in the ongoing human pursuit of knowledge. The environment encourages me to reflect on the deeper purposes behind innovation and how humans connect with new ideas. This place feels like a temple of questions, open to philosophical wandering.
